title: Our Story
description: A journey of unexpected paths crossing through conversations.

chapters.title: Knowing From Afar
chapters.subtitle: Parallel paths, different schools
chapters.description: We lived different lives and went to different schools in different hometowns. You occasionally visited my hometown to visit your uncle's house, and though we knew of each other's existence since we were small, we never made conversation back then.

chapters.title: The Silent Years
chapters.subtitle: Separate worlds, separate colleges
chapters.description: Life took us to completely different colleges and journeys. Years rolled on in silence, with each of us focused on our own goals, studies, and circles.

chapters.title: The Simple Tap
chapters.subtitle: An Instagram request
chapters.description: About a month ago, I came across your profile on Instagram and initiated the connection by sending a request. You accepted it, and a digital connection was established.

chapters.title: First Conversation
chapters.subtitle: "Is this connection sent by you?"
chapters.description: The silence broke when you messaged first, asking if the connection was sent by me. That single question initiated our first conversation, opening a door we had never knocked on before.

chapters.title: My Comfort Zone
chapters.subtitle: Finding peace in conversations
chapters.description: Since that day, our chats became a quiet shelter. Your calmness, understanding, and childish behavior made these conversations the absolute highlight of my day.
